'''zhayama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceboid|ceboid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceboid|ceboid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhayama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæyæmæth|zhæyæmæth]] || [[word:zhæyæmæj|zhæyæmæj]] || [[word:zhæyæmæsh|zhæyæmæsh]] || [[word:zhæyæmæ|zhæyæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhayayamath|zhayayamath]] || [[word:zhayayamaj|zhayayamaj]] || [[word:zhayayamash|zhayayamash]] || [[word:zhayayama|zhayayama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhayamath|zhayamath]] || [[word:zhayamaj|zhayamaj]] || [[word:zhayamash|zhayamash]] || [[word:zhayama|zhayama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhayafmath|zhayafmath]] || [[word:zhayafmaj|zhayafmaj]] || [[word:zhayafmash|zhayafmash]] || [[word:zhayafmaf|zhayafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhayamatha|zhayamatha]] || [[word:zhayamaja|zhayamaja]] || [[word:zhayamasha|zhayamasha]] || [[word:zhayamaka|zhayamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhayamath|zhayamath]] || [[word:zhayamaj|zhayamaj]] || [[word:zhayamash|zhayamash]] || [[word:zhayama|zhayama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhayamathal|zhayamathal]] || [[word:zhayamajal|zhayamajal]] || [[word:zhayamashal|zhayamashal]] || [[word:zhayamakal|zhayamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhayamathatha|zhayamathatha]] || [[word:zhayamajaja|zhayamajaja]] || [[word:zhayamashasha|zhayamashasha]] || [[word:zhayamaka|zhayamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhayamathan|zhayamathan]] || [[word:zhayamajan|zhayamajan]] || [[word:zhayamashan|zhayamashan]] || [[word:zhayamakan|zhayamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhayamathaoro|zhayamathaoro]] || [[word:zhayamajaoro|zhayamajaoro]] || [[word:zhayamashaoro|zhayamashaoro]] || [[word:zhayamakaoro|zhayamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
